memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Guy II of Ponthieu (1120-1147)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Guy II of Ponthieu (c. 1120–25 December 1147) was the son of William III of Ponthieu and Helie of Burgundy.

Life

memoryArtifacts.headline: Wikipedia
memoryArtifacts.description:
Guy II de Ponthieu († 1147), fut comte de Ponthieu de 1126 à 1147. Il était fils de Guillaume Ier, comte de Ponthieu et seigneur d'Alençon, et d'Hélène de Bourgogne.



Son père lui donna le Ponthieu …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Ponthieu II於1115年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆時，他的父親Guillaume III Talvas28歲，母親Hélène de Bourgogne35歲。他於1145年之前與Ida de Saint-Pol結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1147年登記服兵役。他去世於1147年12月25日在土耳其易茲米爾 易利享年32歲，埋葬在法國朋提額。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Ponthieu, a habitational name from Ponthieu, a region (former county) in Picardy, between the rivers Authie and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Ponthieu II was born in 1115, in Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Guillaume III Talvas, was 28 and his mother, Hélène de Bourgogne, was 35. He married Ida de Saint-Pol before 1145. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1147. He died on 25 December 1147, in İzmir, Türkiye, at the age of 32, and was buried in Ponthieu, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Ponthieu II est né en 1115, à Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Guillaume III Talvas, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Hélène de Bourgogne, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Ida de Saint-Pol avant 1145. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1147. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1147, à İzmir İli, Turquie, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Ponthieu, France.

de.Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de: Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Ponthieu II 1115 in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume III Talvas 28 und seine Mutter Hélène de Bourgogne 35. Er hat vor 1145 Ida de Saint-Pol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1147 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1147 im Alter von 32 Jahren in İzmir İli, Türkei und wurde in Ponthieu, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Ponthieu II è nato il nel 1115 nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume III Talvas, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Hélène de Bourgogne, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Ida de Saint-Pol prima del 1145. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1147. Morì il 25 dicembre 1147, nel İzmir İli, Turchia, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Ponthieu, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Ponthieu IIが1115年にフランスピカーディソンメで生まれた時，父Guillaume III Talvasは28歳，母Hélène de Bourgogneは35歳であった。1145年以前にIda de Saint-Polと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1147年に兵役登録をした。彼は1147年12月25日にトルコイズミール イリで32歳で死去し，フランスポンスイエウにて埋葬された。

ko.Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 니우프cha텔--사스노이스
ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Ponthieu II(이)가 1115년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume III Talvas(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Hélène de Bourgogne(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1145년 이전 Ida de Saint-Pol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1147년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1147년 12월 25일 튀르키예 이즈미르 이리에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 폰스이외에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Ponthieu II nasceu em 1115, em Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guillaume III Talvas, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Hélène de Bourgogne, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida de Saint-Pol antes 1145. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1147. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1147, em İzmir İli, Turquia, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Ponthieu, França.

ru.Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de: неуфчaтел-ен-саосноис, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Ponthieu II родился в 1115 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume III Talvas было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Hélène de Bourgogne, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida de Saint-Pol перед 1145 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1147 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 декабря 1147 г. в местности измир или, Турция в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности понтиеу, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Ponthieu II nació en 1115, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume III Talvas, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Hélène de Bourgogne, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Ida de Saint-Pol antes de 1145. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1147. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1147, en Provincia de Esmirna, Turquía, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Ponthieu, Francia.
